specific_question: How many suspension component failures were detected during Elexion Automotive's durability test of the 2025 model prototype in November 2024?
answer: During the November 2024 durability test, Elexion Automotive detected 18 suspension components in 2025 model prototypes after an average of 127,000 simulated miles.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
